'''thojaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:libellary|libellary]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-j-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:libellary|libellary]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thojaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thojarithi|thojarithi]] || [[word:thojariji|thojariji]] || [[word:thojarishi|thojarishi]] || [[word:thojariki|thojariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thojaruthuthu|thojaruthuthu]] || [[word:thojarujuju|thojarujuju]] || [[word:thojarushushu|thojarushushu]] || [[word:thojarukuku|thojarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojaruthu|thojaruthu]] || [[word:thojaruju|thojaruju]] || [[word:thojarushu|thojarushu]] || [[word:thojaruku|thojaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojarufthuf|thojarufthuf]] || [[word:thojarufjuf|thojarufjuf]] || [[word:thojarufshuf|thojarufshuf]] || [[word:thojarufkuf|thojarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thojarethe|thojarethe]] || [[word:thojareje|thojareje]] || [[word:thojareshe|thojareshe]] || [[word:thojareke|thojareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thojarothotho|thojarothotho]] || [[word:thojarojojo|thojarojojo]] || [[word:thojaroshosho|thojaroshosho]] || [[word:thojarokoko|thojarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojarotho|thojarotho]] || [[word:thojarojo|thojarojo]] || [[word:thojarosho|thojarosho]] || [[word:thojaroko|thojaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojarofthof|thojarofthof]] || [[word:thojarofjof|thojarofjof]] || [[word:thojarofshof|thojarofshof]] || [[word:thojarofkof|thojarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thojarïfthïf|thojarïfthïf]] || [[word:thojarïfjïf|thojarïfjïf]] || [[word:thojarïfshïf|thojarïfshïf]] || [[word:thojarïfkïf|thojarïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thojarïfthïfthïf|thojarïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thojarïfjïfjïf|thojarïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thojarïfshïfshïf|thojarïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thojarïfkïfkïf|thojarïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojarïfthïf|thojarïfthïf]] || [[word:thojarïfjïf|thojarïfjïf]] || [[word:thojarïfshïf|thojarïfshïf]] || [[word:thojarïfkïf|thojarïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojarïfthïf|thojarïfthïf]] || [[word:thojarïfjïf|thojarïfjïf]] || [[word:thojarïfshïf|thojarïfshïf]] || [[word:thojarïfkïf|thojarïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thojaræthæ|thojaræthæ]] || [[word:thojaræjæ|thojaræjæ]] || [[word:thojaræshæ|thojaræshæ]] || [[word:thojarækæ|thojarækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thojarathatha|thojarathatha]] || [[word:thojarajaja|thojarajaja]] || [[word:thojarashasha|thojarashasha]] || [[word:thojarakaka|thojarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojaratha|thojaratha]] || [[word:thojaraja|thojaraja]] || [[word:thojarasha|thojarasha]] || [[word:thojaraka|thojaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojarafthaf|thojarafthaf]] || [[word:thojarafjaf|thojarafjaf]] || [[word:thojarafshaf|thojarafshaf]] || [[word:thojarafkaf|thojarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thojarasha|thojarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thojarshësha|thojarshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thojarosha|thojarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thojarmusha|thojarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thojaryasha|thojaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothojarnkshësha|gothojarnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothojarnkrosha|gothojarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothojarnkmusha|gothojarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothojarnkyasha|gothojarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thojajarasha|thojajarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thojajarshësha|thojajarshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thojajarosha|thojajarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thojajarmusha|thojajarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thojajaryasha|thojajaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothojajarnkshësha|gothojajarnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothojajarnkrosha|gothojajarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothojajarnkmusha|gothojajarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothojajarnkyasha|gothojajarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thejærasha|thejærasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thejærshësha|thejærshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thejærosha|thejærosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thejærmusha|thejærmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thejæryasha|thejæryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothejærnkshësha|gothejærnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothejærnkrosha|gothejærnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothejærnkmusha|gothejærnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothejærnkyasha|gothejærnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thojfarasha|thojfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thojfarshësha|thojfarshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thojfarosha|thojfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thojfarmusha|thojfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thojfaryasha|thojfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothojfarnkshësha|gothojfarnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothojfarnkrosha|gothojfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothojfarnkmusha|gothojfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothojfarnkyasha|gothojfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
